attestation.burn_and_remint: deterministic race rule, no discretionary branch: if the push is not confirmed before committed_not_before, the T-pulse is burned unexpanded; a new T is chosen, the commitment amended, and pushed before the new T; proceeding on local evidence is not an option
attestation.commitment_witness: this document is committed to git before beacon.committed_not_before; the commit containing it predates the pulse's existence, which is the commitment's entire force
attestation.public_anchor: the commit containing this document must be confirmed fetchable from the public remote https://github.com/debjitbis08/relweblearner before beacon.committed_not_before; the enabling amendment records the remote-side ordering evidence (push event), not presence or self-reported time
attestation.pulse_disclosure: the full JSON of the selected pulse is embedded verbatim in the G9 manifest's draw provenance so the derivation is re-checkable forever against the beacon's public archive
attestation.single_expansion: no other master seed has been or will be expanded for G9 Phase B; exactly one pulse is selected by the rule above and exactly one seed derived from it

beacon.retrieval_hint: GET {base_uri}/pulse/time/next/<epoch-milliseconds of committed_not_before minus one millisecond>; non-normative, the selection_rule is authoritative
beacon.selection_rule: the unique pulse on chain 2 with the smallest timeStamp greater than or equal to committed_not_before; the beacon emits one pulse per minute, so under normal operation this is the pulse with timeStamp 2026-07-24T14:30:00.000Z exactly

derivation.downstream: the master seed then enters the frozen per-world derivation SHA-256(master_seed || world_name) unchanged for the 44 per-world draws, as enforced by the G9 loader
derivation.master_seed_hex: the lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256 digest of the 64 bytes obtained by hex-decoding the selected pulse's outputValue field

manifest_id_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON with manifest_id omitted

ordering_witness.role: ordering witness only, proving the G8 block sealed before G9 Phase B was preregistered; never a seed source

purpose: G9 Phase B seed commitment (plan sections 5 and 7): the fresh master seed is derived from a named public randomness beacon pulse committed to here before it exists, removing seed discretion mechanically rather than by attestation. Over G8 this adds the public-anchor upgrade: the commit containing this document must be confirmed fetchable on the public remote before the pulse time, so the ordering evidence is remote-side, not self-reported.
